info.title: How Credits Work
info.creditRatio: Credits convert to reviews based on content format:
info.audiobookNote: Audiobooks cost more because they require more time and effort from readers.
info.validityExplanation: Credits must be activated (allocated to a campaign) within a specific window based on your package size:
info.validity30: Up to 200 credits: 30 days to activate
info.activationNote: Once activated, your campaign runs until completion with no time limit.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.answer1: Each package has an activation window (30, 90, or 120 days depending on the package). You must START using your credits within this timeframe by creating a campaign. Once activated, you can continue using the credits for that campaign until completion.
faq.answer1Example: Example: If you buy the 100-credit package with a 30-day activation window, you have 30 days to create a campaign. Once you create the campaign and allocate credits, those credits don't expire - you can use them until your campaign is complete.
faq.question2: What happens if I don't activate within the window?
faq.answer2: If you don't create a campaign within the activation window, the unused credits will expire. We recommend purchasing credits when you're ready to launch your campaign to avoid losing them.
faq.answer3: Unused credits can be refunded within 14 days of purchase. Once credits are allocated to a campaign, they become non-refundable.
faq.question4: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.answer4: We accept all major credit cards, debit cards, and digital wallets through our secure Stripe payment gateway.
faq.question5: Can I purchase credits for multiple books?
faq.answer5: Yes! Credits are added to your account balance and can be allocated to any of your campaigns. However, remember to activate them by creating a campaign within the activation window.
